violations.description: Preventing contamination of packaged and unpackaged food. — --Raw animal food was not properly separated from raw or cooked ready-to-eat food. Raw chicken, raw burger stored with onions and jalapenos. Store seperately, according to cook temperature.
Thawing potentially hazardous food. — --Potentially hazardous food was not thawed in an approved manner. Shrimp and chicken. Thaw under running water, not standing water.

Date marking and disposition of ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food. — --Refrigerated, ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food - carnitas - was not consumed/discarded within 10 calendar days from the date of preparation.--Refrigerated, ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food - shredded chicken - (prepared more than 24 hours ago) was not properly date marked.
